Issue Description: Two suburb service area pages blocked by robots.txt wildcard disallow rule
Recommended Fix: Remove the wildcard rule blocking /service-area/* in robots.txt and verify in GSC URL Inspection after 48 hours

Issue Description: Nine pages have redirect chains (A > B > C) adding latency and diluting link equity
Recommended Fix: Update all internal links and sitemap entries to point directly to the final destination URL; eliminate middle hops

Issue Description: Homepage HTTP version returns 301 to HTTPS but HTTPS version also redirects to www - two-hop chain
Recommended Fix: Consolidate to a single redirect: http://example.com > https://www.example.com directly

Issue Description: Three service pages have zero internal links pointing to them and are unreachable by crawlers without the sitemap
Recommended Fix: Add contextual links from relevant service category pages and from the homepage footer services list

Issue Description: XML sitemap includes 4 URLs currently returning 404 from a previous site migration
Recommended Fix: Remove broken URLs from sitemap; add 301 redirects from old URLs to nearest live equivalent pages

Issue Description: Six suburb service area pages in GSC with status Crawled - currently not indexed due to thin and duplicate content
Recommended Fix: Write 400+ words of unique local copy per page including suburb references; differentiate from other suburb variants

Issue Description: No LocalBusiness schema markup present on any page across the site
Recommended Fix: Implement LocalBusiness JSON-LD on homepage and contact page including name / address / phone / hours / service area

Issue Description: No Service schema markup on individual service pages
Recommended Fix: Add Service schema with name / description / areaServed / provider on all primary service pages

Issue Description: Eleven service pages use duplicate or generic title tag pattern: [Service] | CompanyName with no location modifier
Recommended Fix: Rewrite using pattern: [Primary Service Keyword] in [City/Area] | [Brand Name] - max 60 characters

Issue Description: Eight suburb-level location pages have no city or suburb name in the title tag
Recommended Fix: Add the suburb name to each title tag following the pattern: [Service] in [Suburb] | [Brand Name]

Issue Description: Three title tags exceed 70 characters and are being truncated in SERPs
Recommended Fix: Shorten to under 60 characters while preserving the primary keyword and location modifier

Issue Description: Seven pages are missing an H1 tag entirely - either the theme is using H2 as the visual heading or the heading block was deleted
Recommended Fix: Add an H1 to each page that includes the primary service keyword and location; match intent of the title tag

Issue Description: Two pages have multiple H1 tags due to a page builder widget conflict
Recommended Fix: Inspect the page builder template and change secondary H1 instances to H2

Issue Description: Fourteen pages missing meta descriptions including three high-impression pages per GSC
Recommended Fix: Write unique meta descriptions for all pages missing them; prioritise pages with over 200 monthly GSC impressions first

Issue Description: Nine pages share an identical meta description - appears to be a CMS default
Recommended Fix: Replace default template meta descriptions with unique copy per page referencing the service and location

Issue Description: Six service area pages have under 300 words - Google has flagged these as thin and excluded from index
Recommended Fix: Expand each page with unique local copy: suburb-specific intro / service relevance / local trust signals / FAQ section
Tool Source: GSC Coverage + Screaming Frog Word Count

Issue Description: Two service category hub pages have under 200 words and function as directory pages only
Recommended Fix: Add a 300-400 word introductory section per hub page describing the service range and why the business is the local choice

Issue Description: Four suburb pages are near-identical copies with only the suburb name swapped inline - no other differentiation
Recommended Fix: Differentiate each page with suburb-specific details: drive time from city centre / local testimonials / area-specific notes

Issue Description: Hot water repair service page ranks at position 4.2 average but has 2.1% CTR - expected CTR is 7-8% at that position
Recommended Fix: Update title to include location and urgency signal; rewrite meta description with same-day service mention and CTA

Issue Description: Drain cleaning page ranks at position 6.8 with 1.4% CTR - no location in title tag or meta description
Recommended Fix: Add suburb to title tag; rewrite meta description with specific drain types served and contact prompt

Issue Description: Business name spelling inconsistent across 3 citations: one uses abbreviated name without Inc suffix
Recommended Fix: Update citation records on Yelp / YellowPages / TrueLocal to match the exact name as listed on the website footer and GBP

Issue Description: Phone number on website footer uses a tracking number that differs from the GBP primary phone - creates NAP mismatch
Recommended Fix: Either update GBP to show the tracking number as primary or update footer to show the GBP number and track it via GA4 events instead

Issue Description: Primary GBP category is set to Contractor rather than Plumber - missing category-specific local pack features
Recommended Fix: Change primary category to Plumber; add secondary categories for HVAC Contractor and Electrician where licensed

Issue Description: No BreadcrumbList schema implemented sitewide - breadcrumb trail absent from search results
Recommended Fix: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to page templates or configure via Yoast / RankMath breadcrumb settings

Issue Description: No review schema or structured review widget on service pages - review count not visible in organic results
Recommended Fix: Implement AggregateRating schema pulling from Google review feed or add a widget that outputs valid markup

Issue Description: Homepage links directly to only 4 of 14 service pages - remaining 10 accessible only via mega-menu
Recommended Fix: Add a services section to the homepage body with links to all 14 service pages using descriptive anchor text

Issue Description: Service category hub pages do not link to suburb-specific variants of those services
Recommended Fix: Add a Locations We Serve section to each hub page with links to all relevant service area variants

Issue Description: Suburb service pages do not link to related services available in that suburb
Recommended Fix: Add a Related Services section or inline contextual links from each suburb page to sister services in that area

Issue Description: No breadcrumb navigation implemented on any page - users and bots cannot infer page hierarchy
Recommended Fix: Implement breadcrumb navigation through CMS settings or custom theme modification; mark up with BreadcrumbList schema

Issue Description: 12 internal links use Click here or Learn more as anchor text - missing keyword signals
Recommended Fix: Update anchor text to descriptive phrases referencing the destination page topic (e.g. our Springfield plumbing services)

Issue Description: 43 images across service and blog pages have empty alt attributes - accessibility and image search issue
Recommended Fix: Add descriptive alt text to all images; for service photos use format: [Service type] in [Suburb] by [Brand Name]

Issue Description: 18 images exceed 200KB each on service pages - affecting page speed and Core Web Vitals scores
Recommended Fix: Compress all images to under 100KB using WebP format; implement lazy loading for images below the fold
